series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, notices of hearings, violations, or opportunity to request a hearing; requests for a hearing; hearing documention; adjudication orders, determinations, and any other documentation of the outcome of a hearing or decision; settlement and negotiation documents; motions; entries; exhibits; transcript of the hearing; objections; evidence; and correspondence relating to a hearing.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist ; Electronic: record shall be destroyed five years last enforcement or administrative action occurred in case, so long as all appeals periods have expired
